task: Remove all Lovable-generated mock/demo behavior and connect the frontend exclusively to the Laravel backend
critical_instruction: Before making any changes, analyze every document inside the /docs directory. Treat them as the single source of truth. Review Requirements Architecture Document, Functional Specification Document, Database Architecture Document, PRD, Design Document, Technology Stack Document, System Architecture Document, API Specification Document, Security Architecture Document, Role Permission Matrix, OpenAPI Documentation, and Deployment & DevOps Guide. Do not implement anything that conflicts with those documents.
objective: Convert the frontend from a mock-data/demo implementation into a fully backend-driven application where all dynamic data originates from the Laravel API and MySQL database.
requirements: Remove all Lovable branding, credits, references, badges, footer links, metadata, comments, and generated attribution.
Remove all local fake messaging systems.
Remove all frontend-only business logic that bypasses the backend.
Remove all mock Zustand state initialization values.
Remove all temporary development data generators.

instructions: Use only Laravel API responses as the source of truth.
Connect all pages to the API endpoints defined in the OpenAPI specification.
Implement automatic logout on invalid tokens.
Persist authentication state through API validation.
Load dashboard metrics from backend endpoints.
Load images from Cloudinary URLs returned by backend.
Connect all management tables to backend APIs.
Load AI moderation queue from backend.
Preserve existing route structure defined in the architecture documents.
Protect routes using backend authentication status.
Apply role-based access control according to Role Permission Matrix.
Do not store sensitive data in local storage.

quality_checks: Search the entire frontend codebase for mock data.
Search the entire frontend codebase for placeholder arrays.
Search the entire frontend codebase for hardcoded statistics.
Search the entire frontend codebase for demo users.
Search the entire frontend codebase for Lovable branding.
Replace every instance with backend-driven implementation.
Generate a report of every removed mock source.
